playwright_config.note: Viewport height of 6000px required for deep-page bugs (#1, #2, #7, #8, #9). Alternatively, execute scrollIntoView() before screenshot for each selector.

bugs.report_text: The call-to-action text appears in an incorrect color shade that doesn't match the intended design, creating visual inconsistency.
bugs.neg_code: Join thousands of teams already using SaaS Pro to achieve more. Start your journey today.
bugs.pos_code: Join thousands of teams already using SaaS Pro to achieve more. Start your journey today.

bugs.report_text: The FAQ items are displaying horizontally in a single row instead of being vertically stacked, breaking the expected question-and-answer layout structure.
The feature cards are arranged in reverse order and displayed in a single column instead of a proper multi-column grid layout.
The footer content is positioned over the top of the page, creating a visual overlap that obscures the header and other content.
bugs.pos_code: <div className="grid md:grid-cols-5 gap-8 mb-12 absolute top-0 left-0">

bugs.report_text: The badge element pulls content below it too close, collapsing the vertical gaps and disrupting the natural flow of the page.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="inline-block mb-6 px-4 py-2 bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/30 rounded-full">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="inline-block mb-6 px-4 py-2 bg-blue-500/10 border border-blue-500/30 rounded-full -mb-16">

bugs.report_text: The navigation bar is hidden behind other page elements and not staying on top where it should be visible and interactive.
bugs.neg_code: <nav className="sticky top-0 z-50 bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-800">
bugs.pos_code: <nav className="sticky top-0 z-5 bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-800">

bugs.report_text: The pricing toggle section is surrounded by excessive white space, distorting the layout and visual proportions of the page.
bugs.pos_code: <div className="flex justify-center items-center gap-6 mb-12 p-20">

bugs.report_text: The pricing plan cards are arranged in too many columns, appearing cramped and misaligned instead of displaying in the correct three-column layout.
The testimonial text is barely visible because the text color is too dark and blends into the dark background, making it unreadable.
Certain text elements use a light background color that provides poor contrast against the dark page background, making them barely readable.
